title: Royal Enfield is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Royal Enfield is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Royal Enfield is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Royal Enfield:
Royal Enfield is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Royal Enfield!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
